- H4: Search ## 2) AFTER OPTIMIZED STRUCTURE - H1: Your Yard Sign in Custom Shapes - H2: Your Yard Sign Material Options - H2: Your Yard Sign Finishing Options - H2: Your Yard Sign Production Times - H2: Your Yard Sign Payment Options - H2: Your Yard Sign Shipping Guidelines - H2: Your Yard Sign Common Uses - H2: Your Yard Sign Artwork Requirements - H2: Custom Shape Your Yard Sign Installation Guide - H2: Frequently Asked Questions ## 3) PRODUCT HEADER

Custom shaped yard signs from Banners.com let you create unique lawn signage that stands out from standard rectangular signs. These die-cut yard signs are perfect for promoting businesses, political campaigns, real estate listings, and special events with eye-catching custom shapes that grab attention. Available in full color printing with durable corrugated plastic construction. See also [custom sizes](https://www.banners.com/yard-signs/custom-sizes).

## 4) CONFIGURATOR LABELS Shape: Custom Shape Size: Choose Dimensions Material: 4mm Corrugated Plastic Printing: Single or Double Sided Turnaround: 1-5 Business Days Accessories: Stakes and Hardware ## 5) PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB

Your yard sign in custom shapes offers unlimited design possibilities for creating memorable outdoor advertising. These professionally printed signs use 4mm white corrugated plastic material that's lightweight, waterproof, and perfect for both short-term and extended outdoor use. The digital printing process delivers vibrant full-color graphics that maintain their appearance in various weather conditions.

Custom shaped yard signs provide superior visibility compared to standard rectangular signs, making them ideal for business promotions, political campaigns, real estate marketing, and event announcements. The hollow flute construction keeps signs lightweight for easy installation while providing excellent durability. Whether you need a single custom design or multiple signs with different shapes, our streamlined ordering process accommodates projects of any size.

Each custom shape your yard sign includes professional finishing options like full bleed printing or white margins, plus optional accessories including H-stakes and mounting hardware. Our online design tools and free templates make creating your custom shaped signage simple and efficient, with real-time order tracking included.

## 6) MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB

Your Yard Sign Material Options

Your yard sign is constructed from premium 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast) that delivers exceptional performance for outdoor applications. This material features hollow flutes running horizontally that provide structural strength while keeping the signs lightweight and easy to handle during installation.

The corrugated plastic construction offers waterproof performance and UV resistance, ensuring your custom shaped signage maintains its appearance throughout extended outdoor exposure. This durable material withstands wind, rain, and temperature fluctuations without warping or deteriorating, making it perfect for long-term advertising campaigns.

Digital printing technology allows for vibrant full-color graphics that penetrate the material surface for lasting color retention. The smooth white surface provides excellent print quality for both text and imagery, while the 4mm thickness offers the perfect balance between durability and cost-effectiveness for professional yard sign applications.

## 7) FINISHING OPTIONS TAB

Your Yard Sign Finishing Options

Your yard sign finishing includes professional options designed to maximize visual impact and installation convenience. Choose between full bleed printing that extends graphics to the edge of your custom shape, or opt for a clean 1/2-inch white margin that frames your design elements.

Single-sided and double-sided printing options accommodate different visibility requirements and budget considerations. Double-sided printing ensures your message reaches audiences from both directions, while single-sided options provide cost-effective solutions for directional signage applications.

Installation accessories include H-stakes in multiple sizes (10x15, 10x24, 10x30), heavy-duty Beefy Stakes for challenging ground conditions, and professional zip ties in 12-inch black or 36-inch white options. Signs exceeding 32" x 48" receive automatic scoring and folding for efficient shipping, though flat shipping alternatives are available upon request.

## 8) PRODUCTION TIMES TAB

Your Yard Sign Production Times

Your yard sign production offers flexible turnaround options ranging from 1 to 5 business days to meet any deadline requirement. Production timing begins once artwork uploads are complete and approved, with same-day emergency rushes available in select cases.

Priority 1-day service accommodates urgent campaigns, while 2-day Express handles time-sensitive projects with an extra day buffer. The popular 3-day Standard option provides the ideal balance of speed and convenience, and 5-day Saver delivers cost savings for non-urgent orders.

Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin production the following business day. If artwork requires prepress review or proofing, production timing starts from final approval confirmation. Contact customer service for emergency same-day options and expedited processing availability.

## 9) PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB

Your Yard Sign Payment Options

Your yard sign orders require full payment before production begins, ensuring immediate processing once artwork approval is complete. We accept all major credit cards including Visa, MasterCard, American Express, and Discover for convenient online payment processing.

Check payments are accepted with orders held for production until payment clears. Credit card charges only process after final order approval, providing complete control over your purchase timing. Corporate accounts and purchase orders may be available for qualifying business customers.

Secure payment processing protects your financial information throughout the ordering process. Payment confirmation triggers immediate production scheduling, with order tracking information provided via email once your custom shaped yard signs enter the manufacturing queue.

## 10) SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB

Your Yard Sign Shipping Guidelines

Your yard sign shipping includes multiple delivery options designed to meet various timing and budget requirements. Standard shipping provides reliable delivery for most orders, while expedited options accommodate urgent project deadlines.

Signs larger than 32" x 48" automatically receive scoring and folding to meet carrier size restrictions and reduce shipping costs. Flat shipping alternatives are available for orders requiring unfolded delivery, though additional fees may apply based on dimensional requirements.

All shipments include tracking information for real-time delivery monitoring. Packaging protects your yard signs during transit using appropriate materials for each order size. Contact customer service for specific shipping questions or special delivery requirements including freight options for large quantity orders.

## 11) COMMON USES TAB

Your Yard Sign Common Uses

Your yard sign in custom shapes serves diverse marketing and communication needs across residential and commercial applications. Political campaigns utilize unique shapes to increase candidate visibility and voter recognition during election seasons. Real estate professionals create eye-catching property signs that stand out from standard rectangular signage.

Business promotions benefit from custom shaped designs that reinforce brand identity and attract customer attention. Event organizers use shaped signs for garage sales, community events, and fundraising activities where distinctive visibility is essential. Construction companies and service providers rely on custom shapes to communicate important safety information and project details.

Educational institutions create yard letter and number signs for sports events, graduations, and school spirit campaigns. The versatility of custom shapes accommodates any message or design requirement while maintaining the durability and cost-effectiveness needed for outdoor advertising applications.

## 12) ARTWORK TAB

Your Yard Sign Artwork Requirements

Your yard sign artwork performs best when submitted as .eps files converted to outlines, ensuring precise reproduction of fonts and graphics. High-resolution .pdf and .jpg files also produce excellent results, with our prepress team available to evaluate file quality before production begins.

Professional graphic design services are available if you need assistance creating or optimizing artwork for your custom shaped signage. Color-critical projects benefit from our Color Match Proof System, which provides accurate color representation before final production.

Order proofs allow you to review artwork, pricing, and order details before production begins, ensuring complete accuracy for your project. The proof process includes low-resolution artwork preview, order summary, and billing confirmation. Production holds until you provide final approval, giving you complete control over the process.

## 13) POST-TAB CONTENT

Custom shaped yard signs from Banners.com deliver professional results for any outdoor advertising campaign. Our streamlined ordering process, flexible production times, and comprehensive finishing options ensure your project meets exact specifications while staying within budget constraints.

The combination of durable 4mm corrugated plastic construction and vibrant digital printing creates signage that maintains its appearance throughout extended outdoor exposure. Whether you need a single custom design or multiple signs with different shapes, our production capabilities accommodate projects of any scale.

Professional installation accessories including various stake options and mounting hardware ensure secure placement in any ground condition. With custom sizes available and expert customer service support, creating effective custom shaped yard signs has never been more convenient or affordable for your specific application needs.

## 14) FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

What material are custom shaped yard signs made from?

Custom shaped yard signs are manufactured using 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast) with hollow flutes for lightweight durability. This waterproof material withstands outdoor weather conditions while maintaining vibrant full-color digital printing quality. The construction provides excellent value for both short-term and extended advertising campaigns with professional appearance retention.

Can you help design my custom shaped yard sign?

Yes, our professional graphic design team assists with custom shaped yard sign creation and artwork optimization. We provide free online templates, intuitive design tools, and expert consultation for complex projects. Design services ensure your artwork meets production requirements while maximizing visual impact for your specific application and budget.

What production times are available for custom shapes?

Custom shaped yard signs offer flexible production times from 1 to 5 business days depending on your deadline requirements. Priority 1-day service handles urgent orders, while 5-day Saver options provide cost savings. Production begins after artwork approval, with same-day emergency rushes available in select cases through customer service.

Do custom shaped yard signs include installation hardware?

Installation accessories are available including H-stakes in multiple sizes, heavy-duty Beefy Stakes, and professional zip ties for secure mounting. Stakes accommodate different ground conditions and sign dimensions. All hardware options can be added during the ordering process to ensure complete installation readiness upon delivery.

Are there size limitations for custom shaped yard signs?

Custom shaped yard signs accommodate virtually any size requirement, with signs exceeding 32" x 48" receiving automatic scoring and folding for shipping efficiency. Flat shipping options are available for larger signs requiring unfolded delivery. Contact customer service to discuss specific dimensional requirements and shipping options for oversized custom shapes.

Can I request a proof before my custom shaped yard signs are printed?

Order proofs are available and include low-resolution artwork preview, complete order summary with pricing, and billing information verification. Proofs ensure accuracy before production begins, with orders held until you provide final approval. Color-critical projects benefit from our Color Match Proof System for precise color representation and quality assurance.
